traceability.current_anchor_task: AI Task 073 — Stage 8 Architecture-Derived IA Fallback Package

summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now preserves a validated preview/handoff checkpoint, a validated external UI brief baseline, a completed IA prompt pack, and a blocked IA validation gate that is being recovered through a sanctioned fallback evidence task based only on uploaded workspace artifacts.
summaries.customer_status: The design branch is still progressing, but IA validation cannot advance on text-only evidence. The recovery path now explicitly excludes external Figma-link authority and relies only on uploaded artifacts already brought into the workspace.
summaries.last_iteration: Synchronized the architecture so the IA fallback path uses only uploaded workspace artifacts and no external Figma link as authoritative evidence.
